subcategory: 3D bento grid item with mouse-tracking rotation
use_cases: Building dynamic bento grid layouts for modern web dashboards and landing pages
Creating interactive feature showcase sections with 3D depth effects
Designing portfolio or service display cards with premium hover interactions
Constructing portfolio project grids with spatial mouse-tracking effects
Developing creative agency landing pages with immersive card interactions
ai_summary: A 3D interactive bento grid item component that tracks mouse position to apply dynamic rotation and scale transforms, creating a premium spatial depth effect. The component uses CSS perspective transforms with smooth easing to respond to user cursor movement, making it ideal for modern SaaS dashboards, creative portfolios, and service showcases where visual engagement is paramount.
